daily_summary.headline: SpaceX CRS-34 Launch and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 CRS-34 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX is set to launch the Falcon 9 Block 5 with the Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34 mission, a resupply mission to the ISS.
top_events.action: Watch live on SpaceX's official webcast.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is predicted, offering potential aurora visibility at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check conditions and prepare for aurora viewing in northern regions.

top_events.title: Zhuque-2E Launch
top_events.description: LandSpace's Zhuque-2E rocket is scheduled for launch with an unknown payload.
top_events.action: Follow updates for potential live coverage.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
